file.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      run_e2e_tests:
        type: boolean
        default: false
        description: 'Run E2E tests (triggered by Inspector)'

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  fast-gate:
    name: Fast Gate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
<<<<<<< HEAD
        with:
          version: 10.33.0
=======
>>>>>>> origin/dev

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Verify DATABASE_URL is set
        run: |
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: true"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: false"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || true # npm retired the audit endpoint as of 2025

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Check formatting with Prettier
        run: pnpm format:check

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: pnpm test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-unit
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 3

      - name: Check for TODO/FIXME in production code
        run: |
          if grep -r "TODO\|FIXME" src/ --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "⚠️  Found TODO/FIXME comments in production code"
          fi
        continue-on-error: true

  integration-tests:
    name: Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [fast-gate]
    timeout-minutes: 15
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: mongodb://localhost:27017/test
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY || '' }}
      DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG: default
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}

    services:
      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7
        ports:
          - 27017:27017

228	async function ensureDefaultTenant(payload: Payload): Promise<string> {
229	  const slug = getDefaultTenantSlug()
230	  const existing = await payload.find({
231	    collection: 'tenants',
232	    where: { slug: { equals: slug } },
233	    limit: 1,
234	    overrideAccess: true,
235	  })
236	  if (existing.docs[0]) return existing.docs[0].id
237	  const created = await payload.create({
238	    collection: 'tenants',
239	    data: { name: slug, slug, status: 'active' },
240	    overrideAccess: true,
241	  })
242	  return created.id
243	}

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      run_e2e_tests:
        type: boolean
        default: false
        description: 'Run E2E tests (triggered by Inspector)'

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  fast-gate:
    name: Fast Gate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Verify DATABASE_URL is set
        run: |
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: true"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: false"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || true # npm retired the audit endpoint as of 2025

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Check formatting with Prettier
        run: pnpm format:check

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: pnpm test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-unit
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 3

      - name: Check for TODO/FIXME in production code
        run: |
          if grep -r "TODO\|FIXME" src/ --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "⚠️  Found TODO/FIXME comments in production code"
          fi
        continue-on-error: true

  integration-tests:
    name: Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [fast-gate]
    timeout-minutes: 15
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: mongodb://localhost:27017/test
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY || '' }}
      DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG: default
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}

    services:
      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7
        ports:
          - 27017:27017
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand({ ping: 1 })'"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: pnpm test:int:coverage
        env:
          USE_MONGO_SERVICE: 'true'

      - name: Upload integration coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-int
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 3

  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [fast-gate]
    timeout-minutes: 15
    env:
      NODE_OPTIONS: --max-old-space-size=4096
      DATABASE_URL: mongodb://localhost:27017/test
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}
      NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL: ${{ secrets.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL || 'http://localhost:3000' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}

    services:
      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7
        ports:
          - 27017:27017
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand({ ping: 1 })'"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Cache .next build
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: .next
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-next-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |

        uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
        with:

          key: ${{ runner.os }}-next-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-next-

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Get Playwright version

        run: echo "version=$(pnpm exec playwright --version | head -1)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Cache Playwright browsers

      - name: Install Playwright browsers

on:

  pull_request:
    branches: [main, dev]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      run_e2e_tests:

        default: false

concurrency:

jobs:
  fast-gate:

    timeout-minutes: 10
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/test' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Setup pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4
        with:
          version: 10.33.0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '22'
          cache: 'pnpm'

      - name: Verify DATABASE_URL is set
        run: |
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: true"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL is set: false"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Security audit
        run: pnpm audit --audit-level=high || true # npm retired the audit endpoint as of 2025

      - name: Run typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

      - name: Run ESLint
        run: pnpm lint

      - name: Check formatting with Prettier
        run: pnpm format:check

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: pnpm test:unit -- --coverage

      - name: Upload coverage report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: coverage-unit
          path: coverage/
          retention-days: 3

      - name: Check for TODO/FIXME in production code
        run: |
          if grep -r "TODO\|FIXME" src/ --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "⚠️  Found TODO/FIXME comments in production code"
          fi
        continue-on-error: true

    name: Integration Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

      DEFAULT_TENANT_SLUG: default
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}

      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7

          - 27017:27017

        with:

        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:

      NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL: ${{ secrets.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL || 'http://localhost:3000' }}
      BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN }}

    services:
      mongodb:
        image: mongo:7
        ports:
          - 27017:27017
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "mongosh --eval 'db.runCommand({ ping: 1 })'"
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:

        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: .next
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-next-${{ github.sha }}

        run: pnpm build

    name: E2E Gate (PR → main)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build]
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request' && github.event.pull_request.base.ref != 'dev' && needs.build.result == 'success'
    timeout-minutes: 20
    env:
      DATABASE_URL: mongodb://localhost:27017/test
      PAYLOAD_SECRET: ${{ secrets.PAYLOAD_SECRET || 'test-secret-for-ci' }}
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY || '' }}

      GEMINI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY || '' }}
      NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL: http://localhost:3000

        with:

        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:

          cache: 'pnpm'

        uses: actions/cache/restore@v4
        with:
          path: .next
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-next-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile

        if: steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium

        if: steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true'
        run: pnpm exec playwright install-deps chromium

      - name: Run E2E tests (E2E gate)
        run: pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.e2e-gate.config.ts

        with:

    name: E2E System Tests (${{ matrix.shard }})

          restore-keys: |

          restore-keys: |

      - name: Install Playwright browsers
        if: steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium

        if: steps.playwright-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true'

        with:
